parsed_verdict.evidence: I have given hotness its own fading rate (≈ 0.01/s) separate from the mechanical fading rate... the water's per-second fractional loss is about ten times smaller.
parsed_verdict.reasoning: The response explicitly states different per-second fading rates for hotness vs. mechanical motion, violating N4 (universality of a single rate across all closed systems).
